product_updates.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
product_updates.content: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."

product_updates.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
product_updates.content: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

product_updates.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
product_updates.content: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out…

product_updates.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
product_updates.content: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

product_updates.title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
product_updates.content: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. product_updates.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
product_updates.content: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: Claude’s inner workings and OpenAI’s “super app”

technical_breakthroughs.title: Sperm donors need limits, says a European fertility group
technical_breakthroughs.content: Ties van der Meer doesn’t know how many siblings he has. The 47-year-old was conceived at a private fertility clinic in the Netherlands using sperm provided by an anonymous donor. After the Netherlands banned anonymous donation in 2004, the doctor who ran the clinic destroyed records that might h…
